---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for Pre-Diligence Lab
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? Why is it worth doing?

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Use Case

Concrete example: which user workflow improves, which data source / market / panel is affected.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2

## Additional Context

Mockups, references, prior art, etc.
